title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM MH (Medical History) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM MH (Medical History) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw medical history data, (2) Derive USUBJID and MHSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: MHTERM, MHDECOD, MHBODSYS, MHSTDTC, MHENDTC, MHCAT, (4) Handle MedDRA coding hierarchy, body system mapping, history category classification, date handling, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 1116 records.
